titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Divinity School, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday November 27, 2025 at 03:02

did.abstract: The records consist of reports, minutes, lists, correspondence, subject files, daybooks, alumni records, student prize materials, and student data documenting the administrative operations of the Yale Divinity School.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 21-A (YRG 21-A), Central records and records of the dean of the Yale Divinity School.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Divinity School, Yale University, Records (RU 167). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of reports, minutes, lists, correspondence, subject files, daybooks, alumni records, student prize materials, and student data documenting the administrative operations of the Yale Divinity School.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Alumni Association records [also contains 1 page Records of Pastorate, Yale University]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Formerly known as Alumni Board, Alumni/ae Council

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In most cases, these files contain only correspondence regarding the lecturers and the texts of the lectures are not available. Audio/video of lectures may be available in Yale Divinity Library Record Group 53.
